landing.hero_title: Design your study methodology and calculate sample size — powered by AI
landing.hero_subtitle: From research question to IRB-ready protocol in one session. Gap analysis, methodology design, power analysis, and code generation — without waiting weeks for a biostatistician.
landing.hero_footnote: 5 free queries per month. No credit card required.
landing.pain_subheading: These problems cost researchers months of work and thousands in wasted funding.
landing.benchmark_text: In blinded evaluation against GPT-5, ProtoCol scored significantly higher on statistical accuracy, ethical awareness, and code generation.
landing.comparison_subheading: Traditional statistical software charges thousands per year with no AI guidance.
landing.faq_subheading: The short answer: yes, the calculations are real math — not AI guessing.
landing.final_subheading: 5 free queries per month. No credit card. No biostatistician waitlist.
landing.feature_1_desc: Systematically identify knowledge gaps across your field with AI-powered literature search and evidence appraisal.
landing.feature_2_desc: Get expert guidance on study design, including Target Trial Emulation, DAG confounding analysis, and EQUATOR reporting.
landing.feature_3_desc: Power analysis, sample size calculation, and statistical test selection with generated R/Python/STATA code.
landing.feature_4_desc: Export your complete research protocol as a formatted DOCX or PDF document with citations, ready for IRB submission.
landing.pain_1_problem: Waiting weeks for a biostatistician consultation
landing.pain_1_solution: Get sample size calculations in minutes, not weeks
landing.pain_2_problem: Guessing which statistical test fits your design
landing.pain_2_solution: AI recommends the right test based on your study parameters
landing.pain_3_problem: Reviewer comments that your methodology is weak
landing.pain_3_solution: Structured methodology with EQUATOR checklist compliance
landing.pain_4_problem: Underpowered studies that waste months of work
landing.pain_4_solution: Validated power analysis with generated code you can verify
landing.faq_1_q: Can I trust AI for sample size calculations?
landing.faq_1_a: ProtoCol uses deterministic statistical formulas — the same math behind G*Power and PASS. The AI guides you through selecting the right parameters (effect size, alpha, power), then runs validated calculations. Every result includes the formula used and generated R/Python code so you can verify independently.
landing.faq_2_q: Will this be accepted by my IRB or ethics committee?
landing.faq_2_a: ProtoCol generates documentation following EQUATOR reporting guidelines (CONSORT, STROBE, PRISMA). The output is a starting point for your protocol — you review and refine it with your team before submission, just as you would with any statistical consultation.
landing.faq_3_q: How is this different from just using ChatGPT?
landing.faq_3_a: General-purpose chatbots hallucinate statistical methods and fabricate references. ProtoCol uses a structured multi-agent pipeline: separate specialized agents for literature search, methodology design, and biostatistics — each with domain-specific validation. In blinded evaluation against GPT-5, ProtoCol scored significantly higher on statistical accuracy, ethical awareness, and code generation.
landing.faq_4_a: RCTs (parallel, crossover, cluster, non-inferiority, equivalence), cohort studies, case-control, cross-sectional, diagnostic accuracy, survival analysis, and more. The methodology agent handles Target Trial Emulation for observational studies and DAG-based confounding analysis.
landing.faq_5_q: Do I need to know statistics to use this?
landing.faq_5_a: No. ProtoCol adapts to your expertise level. In "simple" mode, it explains concepts in plain language and walks you through each decision. In "advanced" mode, it assumes familiarity with statistical frameworks and focuses on technical details.

confidence.high_title: Standard scenario with well-established methods. Cross-check with validated software before protocol submission.
confidence.medium_title: Moderately complex scenario or some assumptions need verification. Review with a biostatistician.
confidence.low_title: Novel or unusual design with limited validation data. Strongly recommend verification with a qualified biostatistician.
